text:
Now I have a complete picture. The current setup has:
- A sidebar with 5 nav items (Dashboard, Cost, Appliances, Usage by Rooms, Emissions)
- But only one main dashboard view with all cards displayed together
- No actual tab switching functionality

The user wants:
1. Remove "Emissions" tab
2. Make the remaining tabs work (Cost, Appliances, Usage by Rooms, Dashboard)

I need to:
1. Remove the Emissions nav item from index.html
2. Add tab switching functionality to show/hide different sections
3. Create separate views for each tab:
   - Dashboard (main overview)
   - Cost (cost analysis)
   - Appliances (device management)
   - Usage by Rooms (room-based usage)

Let me create the implementation. I'll need to modify index.html to add the tab sections and tab switching logic, and update script.js accordingly.
